envelope_defaults.human_readable_summary: Dandelion maps the territory. Admins approve the map. Foundation governs what can happen inside the map. DMWs scope what can be remembered. Digital Twins operate within the approved terrain.
envelope_defaults.model_usage_notes: Reviews are PROPOSED_NOT_REVIEWED. Slack already OPERATING at Foundation; admin can self-serve binding creation today. Other connectors require per-connector RULE 21 research arc + admin policy approval.

items.name: Tool Map Governance Review
items.description: Surfaces D3 Tool Map recommendation regions for admin governance review. Slack-read-first ranks first because C2 runtime is LIVE (Slack OPERATING per Section 4 closeout). Other connectors require per-connector RULE 21 research arc.
items.human_readable_summary: Admin reviews Slack + Google Workspace + Project Tracker activation candidates. Slack admin can self-serve today via /connectors page. Forbidden tools remain absolute.
items.model_usage_notes: Slack admin approval can land immediately given C2 OPERATING substrate (Foundation PR #185 + CT PR #21). Other connectors land at their respective C-slice runtimes.
escalation_path: Security Lead → Founder (for forbidden exclusion modifications)
DMW_scope_implications: Approved tools bound connector-DMW provenance per Wave 2.1 §24
Forbidden tools REJECT outcome cannot scope any DMW
Per-role tool usage constrains per-role DMW scope downstream
governance_review_points: Admin must approve every connector activation per ADR-0084
Per-region Map approval per ADR-0082 Amendment 1
Per-connector RULE 21 research arc completed before adapter approval
Risky writes (≥C6) mandatory dual-control per ADR-0026
safe_defaults: Wave 6 priority matrix as ranking input only
forbidden_defaults: Connector activation from billing entitlement alone
